stocks.impact_theory: Reports of supply chain delays for next-gen Blackwell AI chips due to geopolitical tensions in Taiwan. Economic implications include slowed AI infrastructure buildout, raising costs for hyperscalers. Market psychology: Fear of missing out turns to FUD (fear, uncertainty, doubt). Historical parallel: 2021 chip shortage crushed semis temporarily. Analogies: 1) Like a Ferrari delayed by tire shortage - performance promise but delivery lag hurts hype. 2) Oil rig breakdown halting refinery - upstream disruption cascades downstream.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment shows 65% negative posts on delays (from x_semantic_search), news from Reuters confirms TSMC issues. Volume spike 2x avg, premarket down 3%.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid; hold if owned for recovery in 3-6 months
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Potential 5-8% gain on pullback to $135 support
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Sudden resolution via alt suppliers, broader market rally, or AI demand override.

stocks.justification: High conviction from multiple sources confirming supply issues, historical precedents align.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 2026 deliveries beat estimates by 15% at 520k units, driven by Cybertruck ramp and China recovery. Economic boost to EV adoption, psychology of momentum trading. Parallels: 2020 delivery beats sparked 700% rally. Analogies: 1) Rocket fuel ignition after buildup. 2) Dam breaking, flood of positive momentum.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web news (CNBC, Bloomberg) hails beat; X posts 80% bullish with #TSLAto300 trending (x_keyword_search latest).

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Macro recession hitting auto sales, competition from BYD.

stocks.justification: Strong data but volatile Elon factor tempers to B.

stocks.impact_theory: EU court rules against App Store monopoly, forcing sideloading. Implications: Lower revenue from 30% cut but opens ecosystem. Psychology: Initial fear then adaptation. Parallels: 2019 Epic vs Apple partial win. Analogies: 1) Fence lowered but guards still patrol. 2) Toll booth bypassed on highway.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Mixed X sentiment 55% negative (semantic search), WSJ reports $10B annual hit.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long-term hold, dip buy for rebound
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: AAPL appeals successfully, services growth offsets.

stocks.justification: Regulatory path uncertain but initial reaction bearish.

stocks.impact_theory: China announces $500B stimulus package targeting tech and consumption. Boosts Alibaba's cloud/ecomm. Psychology: Risk-on China trade revival. Parallels: 2020 post-COVID bounce. Analogies: 1) Rain after drought for farmers market. 2) Steroids for underweight athlete.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Bloomberg confirms stimulus; X hype with 70% positive China stocks (keyword search).

stocks.impact_theory: $2B DoD contract extension for AI defense platforms. Implications: Recurring revenue stability. Psychology: Gov contract premium. Parallels: 2021 commercial pivot. Analogies: 1) Lifeline to loyal customer. 2) VIP club membership renewal.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: PR newswire release; X exploding with memes, 75% bullish (semantic).
